Atlanta's Trusted Plumbing Experts

Summit Plumbing delivers reliable solutions for homes across North Atlanta. Serving Marietta to Johns Creek with same-day emergency service.

Call Now: 555-plu-r91

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Rooted in Atlanta, Built on Trust

Founded in 2012, Summit Plumbing grew from a two-person operation to Atlanta's most recommended residential plumbing service. Our team lives and works in the communities we serve.

Our Plumbing Services

Professional plumbing solutions tailored to your needs.

Emergency Plumbing

24/7 rapid response to burst pipes, overflowing toilets, and other urgent plumbing crises.

Learn More →

Water Heater Repair

Expert diagnosis and repair for all water heater types found in Atlanta homes.

Learn More →

Drain Cleaning

Advanced solutions for clogged drains in Atlanta's unique soil conditions.

Learn More →

Pipe Repair

Specialized solutions for Atlanta's shifting soil and aging pipe systems.

Learn More →

Bathroom Remodeling

Plumbing expertise for Atlanta bathroom renovations big and small.

Learn More →

Leak Detection

Advanced technology to find hidden leaks in Atlanta homes.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our plumbing services.

What counts as a plumbing emergency?

Any situation risking water damage or making your home uninhabitable - burst pipes, sewage backups, no hot water in winter, or gas line issues qualify for immediate response.

Do you service older Atlanta homes?

Absolutely. Our team specializes in working with historic plumbing systems found in Craftsman bungalows and mid-century ranches throughout the metro area.

Reviews From Our Plumbing Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"When our 1920s bungalow's original pipes froze during last January's ice storm, Summit had a technician out within 45 minutes. He not only fixed the burst pipe but showed me how to better insulate the crawlspace to prevent future issues. Their knowledge of old Atlanta homes is impressive."

James T. Emergency Plumbing

"Our tankless water heater stopped working right before house guests arrived. The Summit technician diagnosed a sediment buildup from our hard water and had it flushing properly in under an hour. He even left us with a maintenance schedule tailored to Alpharetta's water quality."

Lisa M. Water Heater Repair

"After three plumbers couldn't fix our chronically clogged kitchen drain, Summit's camera found a collapsed pipe under our driveway. Their trenchless repair saved us thousands in excavation costs and preserved our mature landscaping in Roswell."

Robert H. Drain Cleaning
